reviews.author: Christine M
reviews.title: 85th Birthday cake
reviews.text: I ordered a beautiful cake for my mom’s 85th birthday. Kasia is lovely and explained everything to me. Thank you.

reviews.author: Susan K
reviews.title: A gem
reviews.text: A gem of a find. The owner is lovely and makes the most amazing sausage rolls and delicious cakes. Coffee is great and the café is cosy with fresh flowers on every table.

reviews.author: Oliver Walker PPC
reviews.title: Lovely owner, delicious sausage rolls
reviews.text: Visited this new café in Stourport and the owner was lovely. I had a sausage roll and it was delicious.

reviews.author: Susan Curtis
reviews.title: Lovely coffee and cake
reviews.text: What a lovely place for a relaxing coffee and cake. So welcoming and friendly. Super delicious cake and very good coffee.

reviews.author: Kate Harris
reviews.title: Exceptional wedding desserts
reviews.text: Sugar Victoria provided exceptional desserts for our wedding. Bespoke cheesecakes and personalised designs with amazing taste.

reviews.author: Rachel Lee Haines
reviews.title: Beautiful birthday cake
reviews.text: Beautiful birthday cake made by Sugar Victoria. Amazing cakes and cheesecakes with great service.

reviews.author: Bailie B
reviews.title: Amazing food and drink
reviews.text: Amazing food and drink, a fine dining experience at costs cheaper than Starbucks. The menu is lovely and Kasia is wonderful.

reviews.author: Lance Broadwith
reviews.title: Fantastic weekly café visit
reviews.text: Fantastic place for our weekly day date. Fresh rolls and savoury items and excellent cakes made on the premises by Kasia.

reviews.author: Hilary Hollis
reviews.title: Beautiful celebration cupcakes
reviews.text: Kasia made beautiful cupcakes for my daughter’s birthday. Lovely flavours and beautifully presented.

reviews.author: Kieran Startup
reviews.title: Lovely family café
reviews.text: A lovely independent café with friendly service, great hot chocolates, coffee and cake.

reviews.author: Izabelle Broadwith
reviews.title: Fantastic cakes
reviews.text: The cakes are absolutely fantastic and full of flavour. A welcoming place to relax.

reviews.author: Liz Bloomer
reviews.title: Beautiful cakes and pastries
reviews.text: Lovely little café serving beautiful cakes and pastries and open later than most cafés nearby.

reviews.author: Mariyah
reviews.title: Beautifully packaged cakes
reviews.text: Lovely customer service from Kasia. Cakes were beautifully packaged and perfect for gifting.

reviews.author: Melissa Walters
reviews.title: Amazing bakery items
reviews.text: Highly recommend for bespoke bakery items from sausage rolls to cheesecakes and apple pies.

reviews.author: Emma Baylis
reviews.title: Wonderful café
reviews.text: Absolutely wonderful place. Food is delicious and the owner is super friendly.

reviews.author: Megan Brindley
reviews.title: Great coffee and desserts
reviews.text: Iced coffee, sorbet and eclairs were super tasty and well priced. Great atmosphere.

reviews.author: The Cornish Farmer
reviews.title: Fantastic food and coffee
reviews.text: Sampled baguettes, sandwiches, steak and ale pie and soup. Everything had flavour and the coffee is excellent.

reviews.author: Beka O
reviews.title: Cute family café
reviews.text: Cute family run café with lovely cakes, good coffee and Marshfield ice cream.

reviews.author: Jane Stephens
reviews.title: Fresh tasty food
reviews.text: Lovely welcome followed by very tasty freshly made food at a reasonable price.

reviews.author: Simon Pratley
reviews.title: Delicious chocolate cake
reviews.text: Chocolate Christmas cake was delicious and the family loved it.

reviews.author: Jack Connolly
reviews.title: Brilliant food and drink
reviews.text: Lovely small café with brilliant food and drink at a very reasonable price.

reviews.author: Julie
reviews.title: Very friendly service
reviews.text: What a lovely place. The staff were so friendly and welcoming.

reviews.author: Sophie Harrington
reviews.title: Delicious hot chocolate
reviews.text: Had the most delicious orange hot chocolate. Lovely service and cosy atmosphere.

reviews.author: Lee Shaw
reviews.title: Delicious cakes
reviews.text: Visited a few times for cake and everything has been delicious.

reviews.author: Therese Freeman
reviews.title: Beautifully presented desserts
reviews.text: Delicious iced coffee and strawberry tart. Beautifully presented and homemade.

reviews.author: Matt Harris
reviews.title: Amazing food
reviews.text: Amazing food and lovely staff. Will definitely be back.

reviews.author: Angie Monroe
reviews.title: Cute café
reviews.text: Such a cute place and a great addition to Stourport.

reviews.author: Christine Melling
reviews.title: Beautiful birthday cake
reviews.text: Beautiful cake made for my mum’s 85th birthday and tasty coffee too.

reviews.author: Adrian Parker
reviews.title: Great little café
reviews.text: Delicious coffee and cake. Stourport is lucky to have this wonderful café.
